title: Modbus TCP device + status dashboard (UI)
description: Golden driver path: Drivers → device → dashboard.
prompt: Add a Modbus TCP device with holding registers and a simple status dashboard so an operator can see register values.
uiJourney: Explorer / Drivers → create Modbus device → map registers → Dashboard → Operator
humanSteps: In Explorer create a Modbus TCP device; set host/port and holding register map.
Confirm variables appear under the device.
Create a status dashboard with value widgets; open in Operator mode.
